description: 84 - 21-02-2025 - Emails between Peter Mandelson and Ed Llewellyn (former HM Ambassador to Italy, FCDO
text:
Ambassador to Italy, FCDO

From: Ed LlewellyniPersonal

Sent: Fri 21/02/2025 9:59:42 PM (UTC)

To: Peter Mandelson|Personal

Subject: Fw: O/S: Italian approach to Ukraine.
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

To see...

E

Sent from Outlook for iOS
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

From: Ed Llewellyn

Sent: Friday, February 21, 2025 7:00 PM

To: Jes

Subject: FW: O/S: Italian approach to Ukraine.
Jc

1 asked JCS to pull this together — some straws in the wind here on Ukraine over the last 24
hours,

Underlines the value of an in-depth conversation with her, which Chequers will offer.
Ed

From: JCS
Sent: 21 February 2025 18:29
To: JCS ; Ben Fender ; Chris Halliday; JCS *; JCS — ;Alisonkemp;
JCS ; JCS ; Ailsa Terry (No.10) ;
JCS
Cc: David Burton ; Alison Kerr; Ed Llewellyn; JCS ; JCS ; JCS

Subject: O/S: Italian approach to Ukraine.
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

Dear all,
Please find below an update on the Italian approach to Russia/Ukraine:

Regards,
JCS

| Consigliere, Affari Esteri | Head, Foreign & Security Policy
Personal jata Britanr mz

231
parsing_notes: Extract structured email headers (From, To, Cc, Subject, Date/Sent) for each message in the chain. Identify reply/forward nesting depth. Parse each message body separately. Redacted addresses appear as 'PERSONAL' — names are retained. Build sender→recipient edges per message for communication graph.
